title: L'homme du jour
writer: Julien Duvivier, Charles Spaak, Charles Vildrac
actors: Maurice Chevalier, Elvire Popesco, André Alerme
plot: Alfred Boulard, a good-natured electrician, gives his blood to save Mona Thalia, a great theater actress. Mona Thalia survives and Boulard becomes the man of the hour. Grateful to him, Mona helps Alfred to become a singing star. B...
